creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reported by Ernie Luzar luzar722@gmail.com Message-ID: <57050250.4020700@gmail.com>

In particular, on page: https://www.freebsd.org/releases/10.3R/announce.html, the following text:

"SHA256 and MD5 hashes for the release ISO, memory stick, and SD card images are included at the bottom of this message."

Should read:

"SHA256 and SHA256 hashes for the release ISO, memory stick, and SD card images are included at the bottom of this message.
